name: Frozen Lemonade Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can Frozen lemonade concentrate (6 oz), thawed and undiluted
1 container Frozen whipped topping (8 oz), thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Fold the sweetened condensed milk and lemonade concentrate into the whipped topping.
2. Spoon the mixture into the prepared crusts.
3. Freeze until firm.
4. Garnish with lemon slices and fresh mint, if desired.
Can be made ahead of time and kept in the freezer. Allow at least eight hours for the frozen pie to freeze completely.
